title: Front Office Manager - Club Mahindra - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Club Mahindra - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Club Mahindra in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Club Mahindra:
Club Mahindra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Club Mahindra!
